title: selaginella asperula
intro: Selaginella asperula, also known as Asperula or Spikemoss, is a type of small, evergreen plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Selaginella asperula include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Selaginella asperula is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
